diagrams.title: Pumping Lemma String Decomposition
diagrams.description: Shows how a string w is divided into three parts x, y, z with constraints on lengths
elements: Pumpable segment y shown between x and z
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the exact structure required for Pumping Lemma applications

diagrams.title: Myhill-Nerode Equivalence Classes
diagrams.description: Shows how strings are partitioned into equivalence classes based on distinguishability
diagrams.purpose: Understand why finite automata can only handle regular languages with finite equivalence classes

diagrams.title: aⁿbⁿ Non-Regularity Proof Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flowchart for proving non-regularity of aⁿbⁿ using Pumping Lemma
diagrams.purpose: Follow the logical flow of a complete Pumping Lemma proof

visuals.title: Proving Languages Not To Be Regular
visuals.description: Visual diagram for proving languages not to be regular
